hero_title: Quiet beauty rituals for hair, skin, and special days.
hero_description: Île de Beauté beauty is a boutique salon for precise haircuts, restorative treatments, natural makeup, and unrushed care in a calm private studio.
services_title: Everything for a polished, natural glow.
services_description: Choose a single treatment or build a complete beauty ritual with your stylist and beauty therapist.
service_hair_description: Consultation-led cuts, color refreshes, styling, and nourishing treatments matched to your hair texture.
service_skin_description: Gentle cleansing, hydration, lifting massage, and glow-focused procedures for comfortable everyday skin.
service_makeup_description: Soft event makeup, brow shaping, tinting, and finishing touches for photos, dates, and celebrations.
studio_title: A calm room, attentive hands, and products we trust.
studio_description: The salon is designed for privacy and focus: no rushed chairs, no noisy waiting room, only thoughtful appointments and clean professional tools.
feature_private: Private appointment slots with time for consultation
feature_products: Professional products selected for sensitive skin and healthy shine
booking_description: Call us to choose the right service and time. We will help pair treatments, reserve your stylist, and prepare the studio before you arrive.
reviews_description: This block loads the latest verified reviews from Treatwell when the page opens.
reviews_error_description: Treatwell did not respond just now. Please try again later or open the source page.
auth_callout_description: Use your account to keep appointment details close, return to saved preferences, and make future bookings easier.
auth_page_title: Welcome back to Île de Beauté beauty.
auth_page_description: Sign in to continue with your salon account. Authentication is powered by Clerk and stays embedded in our site.
auth_signup_title: Create your Île de Beauté beauty account.
auth_signup_description: Register directly on our website. If Clerk needs a few missing fields, those steps stay embedded here too.
footer_visit_title: Find us in the heart of Zürich.
footer_map_title: Map to Île de Beauté beauty salon
preorder_description: Add products to your preorder cart. There is no online payment: you pay and collect everything directly at Île de Beauté Beauty Salon.
preorder_sign_in_required: Please sign in before creating a preorder.
preorder_verify_email_required: Verify your email address in your account before placing a preorder.
preorder_note_placeholder: Optional product preferences or pickup timing
preorder_pickup_location: Pay and collect at Île de Beauté Beauty Salon
preorder_created_description: We will prepare it for salon pickup.
